mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_cnt, -- 전체 인원 SUM(CASE WHEN dev_id LIKE 'HCNC_S%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_s_cnt, -- 직원 수 (HCNC_S) SUM(CASE WHEN dev_id LIKE 'HCNC_F%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_f_cnt, -- 프리랜서 수 (HCNC_F) SUM(CASE WHEN avail_dt < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avail_cnt, -- 즉시 투입 가능 (전체) SUM(CASE WHEN dev_id LIKE 'HCNC_S%' AND avail_dt < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avail_s_cnt, -- 즉시 투입 가능 (직원) SUM(CASE WHEN dev_id LIKE 'HCNC_F%' AND avail_dt < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avail_f_cnt -- 즉시 투입 가능 (프리랜서) FROM tb_dev_info WHERE del_yn='N' AND use_yn='Y';
